di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation in Java 17.
di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using @Generated or similar annotations will fail to compile without an explicit dependency on jakarta.annotation-api.

di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace removed javax.inject in Java 17.
di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject package was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using @Inject or similar annotations will fail to compile without an explicit dependency on jakarta.inject-api.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag for Java 17 instead of separate source/target flags for Java 8.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags with value 1.8 are incompatible with compiling code intended for Java 17 features and libraries; using 'release' ensures the bytecode and API usage are consistent with the target JDK.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace removed javax.inject in Java 17/Spring Boot 3 environment.
test/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not present in Java 17; Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE namespaces, causing compile errors for missing javax.inject classes.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use Java 17 release flag instead of separate source/target 1.8 flags.
test/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer compiler plugin versions; using source/target 1.8 would compile for Java 8, not Java 17, failing the migration goal.
